label: Minimum Age
description: Validates that age is at least 18
validate: function(value, options, context) { const violations = []; if (value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== '') { const age = Number(value); if (!isNaN(age) && age < 18) { violations.push({ constraint: 'MinAge', field: context.fieldName, message: 'Must be at least 18 years old', value: value, code: 'TOO_YOUNG' }); } } return violations; }
